title: garnotia micrantha
intro: Garnotia micrantha, a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Garnotia micrantha include its potential to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
